title: AI Governance Decision Hierarchy & RACI Matrix

decisionLevels.name: Board of Directors / AI Sub-committee
decisionLevels.authority: Strategic AI policy, risk appetite, AGI readiness investment
decisionLevels.escalationTrigger: Systemic risk, AGI capability threshold breach, regulatory enforcement action

decisionLevels.name: C-Suite Executive Committee (CAIO-led)
decisionLevels.authority: Cross-functional governance execution, model deployment approval (Tier-1)
decisionLevels.escalationTrigger: Model failure >$1M impact, bias violation (DI<0.80), multi-system outage

decisionLevels.name: AI Governance Operating Committee
decisionLevels.authority: Tactical risk management, compliance exception processing
decisionLevels.escalationTrigger: Policy violation, drift alert P1, fair-lending threshold breach

decisionLevels.name: Technical Governance (Platform Team)
decisionLevels.authority: Runtime enforcement, automated remediation, evidence generation
decisionLevels.escalationTrigger: Sentinel rule P1 alert, OPA hard-block, kill-switch activation

severityLevels.name: Systemic Event
severityLevels.response: Full containment + ICGC + Emergency board session
